model_specification_line: smf.wls('full_time ~ treated_post + treated + post + age + age2 + C(sex) + C(state) + C(yr)', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['state']})
sample_selection: YRIMMIG > 0 AND YRIMMIG <= 2007 (immigrated to US by 2007)
BIRTHYR between 1977 and 1996 (DiD age comparison window)
YEAR in [2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016] (pre- and post-DACA years, excluding 2012)
